evals.description: Statistics research — verifies sources and returns verified data table
assertions: Output includes a Statistics Found table with Statistic, Source, URL, Date, and Verified columns
Each statistic has a source URL that was verified via WebFetch
Sources are Tier 1, Tier 2, or Tier 3 only (no content mills or affiliate sites)
Each row includes a Verified (Yes/No) status
Does not include statistics with no named source or link

evals.description: Image research — returns verified stock image URLs with alt text
assertions: Output includes an Images Found table with Platform, URL, Alt Text, and Topic Relevance columns
Image URLs are direct CDN URLs (not page URLs like pixabay.com/photos/...)
Each image has a Verified HTTP 200 status or is marked Unverified
No more than 1 Unverified image in the output
Alt text is a full descriptive sentence (10-125 characters)

evals.description: Competitive analysis — returns gap analysis for a keyword
assertions: Output includes a Competitive Analysis table with Competitor, Word Count, Images, Charts, Freshness, and Gap columns
Each competitor entry has an approximate word count
Gap column identifies specific uncovered topics or weaknesses
Output includes a Recommended Chart Data section with 2-4 data sets
